transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_SHIP_TO_CUST_KEY_TA
transformation_chain.description: To load the SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY from N_GL_REV_MEASURE_TA table to interim keys table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT GL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
FROM $$FINLGLDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE_TA  GL,$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
WHERE GL.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT
GROUP BY 1

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_SHIP_TO_CUST_KEY_TA1
transformation_chain.description: To load the unmatched keys between keys table and N_INV_REV_MEASURE_TA table into interim keys table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT INV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
FROM $$FINLGLDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE_TA  INV,$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
WHERE INV.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SHIP_TO_CUST_KEY_TA  WI_KEY WHERE INV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=WI_KEY.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)
GROUP BY 1

transformation_chain.name: SQ_MT_SHIPTO_CST_PRTY_HIER_TA
transformation_chain.description: To load data from WD0 snapshot Dimension table to WD5 Tax Audit Dimension Table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
SCST.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
SCST.CUSTOMER_TYPE,
SCST.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
SCST.BRANCH_EMPLOYEE_CNT,
SCST.BRANCH_OUT_OF_BUSINESS_FLG, 
SCST.BRANCH_SITE_CEO_TITLE,
SCST.BRANCH_SITE_CEO_NAME, 
SCST.ORGANIZATION_PARTY_TYPE,
SCST.BRANCH_LOCATOR_KEY, 
SCST.HQ_LOCATOR_KEY,
SCST.GU_LOCATOR_KEY, 
SCST.BRANCH_CMMRCL_BIZ_CNCL_SGMT_CD,
SCST.HQ_CMMRCL_BIZ_CNCL_SGMT_CD, 
SCST.GU_CMMRCL_BIZ_CNCL_SGMT_CD,
SCST.BRANCH_PRIMARY_NAME, 
SCST.BRANCH_COMPANY_TARGET_ID_INT,
SCST.HQ_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
SCST.HQ_PRIMARY_NAME,
SCST.HQ_COMPANY_TARGET_ID_INT, 
SCST.GU_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
SCST.GU_PRIMARY_NAME, 
SCST.GU_COMPANY_TARGET_ID_INT,
SCST.BRANCH_SIC_CD, 
SCST.BRANCH_SITE_EMPLOYEE_CNT,
SCST.BRANCH_YEAR_ESTABLISHED_INT, 
SCST.BRANCH_ANNUAL_REVENUE_USD_AMT,
SCST.BRANCH_DUNS_NUM, 
SCST.BRANCH_CUST_MKT_SEGMENT_CD,
SCST.BRANCH_SALES_CHANNEL_CD, 
SCST.BRANCH_SUPER_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
SCST.BRANCH_VMS_DETAIL_CD, 
SCST.BRANCH_VMS_SUBGROUP_CD,
SCST.BRANCH_VMS_TOP_CD, 
SCST.BRANCH_STATUS_CD,
SCST.BRANCH_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT,
SCST.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
SCST.BRANCH_RECOGNIZED_FLG,
SCST.BRANCH_HQ_BRANCH_CD, 
SCST.BRANCH_CUST_MKT_SGMT_V2_CD,
SCST.BRNCH_PRNT_CUST_MKT_SGMT_V2_CD,
SCST.BRANCH_LEGAL_STATUS_CD, 
SCST.HQ_SIC_CD,
SCST.HQ_SITE_EMPLOYEE_CNT, 
SCST.HQ_YEAR_ESTABLISHED_INT,
SCST.HQ_ANNUAL_REVENUE_USD_AMT, 
SCST.HQ_DUNS_NUM,
SCST.HQ_CUST_MKT_SEGMENT_CD, 
SCST.HQ_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
SCST.HQ_SUPER_SALES_CHANNEL_CD, 
SCST.HQ_RECOGNIZED_FLG,
SCST.HQ_CUST_MKT_SGMT_V2_CD, 
SCST.HQ_PRNT_CUST_MKT_SGMT_V2_CD,
SCST.HQ_LEGAL_STATUS_CD, 
SCST.HQ_VMS_DETAIL_CD,
SCST.HQ_VMS_SUBGROUP_CD, 
SCST.HQ_VMS_TOP_CD,
SCST.HQ_STATUS_CD, 
SCST.HQ_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT,
SCST.GU_SIC_CD, 
SCST.GU_SITE_EMPLOYEE_CNT,
SCST.GU_YEAR_ESTABLISHED_INT, 
SCST.GU_ANNUAL_REVENUE_USD_AMT,
SCST.GU_DUNS_NUM, 
SCST.GU_CUST_MKT_SEGMENT_CD,
SCST.GU_SALES_CHANNEL_CD, 
SCST.GU_SUPER_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
SCST.GU_VMS_DETAIL_CD, 
SCST.GU_VMS_SUBGROUP_CD,
SCST.GU_VMS_TOP_CD, 
SCST.GU_STATUS_CD,
SCST.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT, 
SCST.GU_RECOGNIZED_FLG,
SCST.GU_CUST_MKT_SGMT_V2_CD, 
SCST.GU_PRNT_CUST_MKT_SGMT_V2_CD,
SCST.GU_LEGAL_STATUS_CD, 
SCST.DV_CSC_CMPNY_SUPER_SLS_CHNL_CD,
SCST.DV_CSC_COMPANY_NAME, 
SCST.BRANCH_CITY_NAME,
SCST.BRANCH_STATE_OR_PROVINCE_NAME,
SCST.BRANCH_POSTAL_CD, 
SCST.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
SCST.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
SCST.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
SCST.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
SCST.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT 
FROM	
$$FINLGLDB.MT_SHIPTO_CST_PRTY_HIER_TA_WD0 SCST,$$STGDB.WI_SHIP_TO_CUST_KEY_TA  WI_KEY
WHERE SCST.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=WI_KEY.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
